ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Customer status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the customer (e.g., website, in-store, referral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_demographics" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the household */,
  "homeownership_status" TEXT /* Homeownership status (e.g., owner, renter) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "email_opt_in" INTEGER /* Opt-in status for email marketing */,
  "sms_opt_in" INTEGER /* Opt-in status for SMS marketing */,
  "mail_opt_in" INTEGER /* Opt-in status for mail marketing */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "preferred_contact_time" TEXT /* Preferred time for communication */,
  "push_notification_opt_in" INTEGER /* Opt-in status for push notifications */,
  "preferred_communication_channel" TEXT /* Preferred communication channel (e.g., email, SMS, phone) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., call, email, in-store visit) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee who handled the interaction */,
  "interaction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction (e.g., resolved, pending) */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel of the interaction (e.g., phone, email, in-store) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x10x10 cm) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to redeem rewards */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward offered by the program */,
  "maximum_points" INTEGER /* Maximum points that can be earned in the program */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum spend required to earn points */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loyalty" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "program_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the loyalty program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the customer enrolled in the program */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer in the program */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction that earned points */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Points redeemed by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "campaign_goal" TEXT /* Goal of the campaign (e.g., increase sales, customer retention) */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign (e.g., email, social media, in-store) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_target_audience FOREIGN KEY ("target_audience") REFERENCES customer_preferences ("customer_id")
)
